summary: Iteration 3 testing complete. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all new profile features: Configuracion (password change), Ayuda (contact info), Acerca de (school info), and PWA manifest.

issues: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow' - cosmetic warning only, does not affect functionality

context_for_next_testing_agent: All new profile features verified: 1) POST /api/auth/change-password works with proper validation (wrong password, short password, success), 2) Profile page shows 4 menu items (Mi Progreso, Configuracion, Ayuda, Acerca de), 3) Configuracion section expands with password change form (3 inputs + button), 4) Ayuda section shows Intercultura contact info (phone, WhatsApp, email, website, 2 campus locations, FAQ), 5) Acerca de section shows school info (founded 1993, methodology, etc), 6) PWA manifest.json exists with Intercultura branding, 7) favicon.png is accessible.

backend_change_password_wrong_current.details: POST /api/auth/change-password with wrong current password returns 400 with 'Contraseña actual incorrecta'

backend_change_password_short_new.details: POST /api/auth/change-password with <6 char new password returns 400 with validation message

backend_change_password_success.details: POST /api/auth/change-password with correct data returns 200, password actually changes

backend_pwa_manifest.details: GET /manifest.json returns Intercultura branding (name, short_name, theme_color, icons)

frontend_profile_menu_items.details: Profile page shows 4 menu items: Mi Progreso, Configuracion, Ayuda, Acerca de

frontend_configuracion_section.details: Configuracion expands showing password change form with 3 inputs and Actualizar Contrasena button

frontend_ayuda_section.details: Ayuda expands showing phone +(506) 2656-3000, WhatsApp +(506) 8330-3555, email info@interculturacostarica.com, website, Campus Heredia, Campus Samara, FAQ

frontend_acerca_de_section.details: Acerca de expands showing Intercultura Costa Rica, founded 1993, Cambridge methodology, Version 1.0

frontend_password_form_validation.details: Password form shows proper validation messages: empty fields, wrong password, password mismatch
